skins.name: Pentakill Karthus
skins.description: Lead singer of heavy-metal sensation PENTAKILL, Karthus sings in the voice of a fallen angel made of freshly polished chrome and dynamite that eats other dynamite. His vocals explode the sun in the sky, igniting the flame of metal within the hearts of all who hear.

skins.name: Karthus Lightsbane
skins.description: Dark sorcerer, master of forbidden magic, aspiring lich—all could describe Karthus Lightsbane, a high level spellcaster with shadowy motivations. The rest of the party is convinced he'll eventually betray them, since nothing in the Riftquest rules says he can't.

skins.name: Pentakill III: Lost Chapter Karthus

chromas.name: Pentakill III: Lost Chapter Karthus (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2021.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2021.

chromas.name: Pentakill III: Lost Chapter Karthus (Rose Quartz)

skins.description: All hail, Karthus, the Voice of Doom, and Chosen of Perpetuum! His songs are bleak murder ballads, a bitter reminder that all things must die. Though, perhaps, not him?

skins.name: Elderwood Karthus

chromas.name: Elderwood Karthus (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2023.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2023.

skins.description: Karthus was a brilliant scholar once upon a time. But when a disease nearly eradicated his people, he researched forbidden Coven magic, hoping to resurrect his loved ones... with catastrophic consequences. Now, he roams the Elderwood as a decaying creature, spreading his plague throughout the forest and inviting its inhabitants to transcend through death.

passive.name: Death Defied
passive.description: Upon dying, Karthus enters a spirit form that allows him to continue casting spells.

spells.name: Lay Waste
spells.description: Karthus unleashes a delayed blast at a location, dealing damage to nearby enemies.
spells.dynamicDescription: Creates a delayed blast,  after 0.5 seconds, deals <magicDamage>@QDamage@ magic damage</magicDamage> to each nearby enemy, this deals double damage if it hits only a single unit.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Wall of Pain
spells.description: Karthus creates a passable screen of leeching energy.  Any enemy units that walk through the screen have their Movement Speed and Magic Resist reduced for a period.
spells.dynamicDescription: Creates a wall at target location that lasts for @Duration@ seconds. Enemies that pass through the wall have their Magic Resist reduced by @MagicReduction*-100@% and <status>Slowed</status> by @Slow*-100@% for @Duration@ seconds (their Movement Speed gradually recovers over the duration).@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Defile
spells.description: Karthus passively steals energy from his victims, gaining Mana on each kill.  Alternatively, Karthus can surround himself in the souls of his prey, dealing damage to nearby enemies, but quickly draining his own mana.
spells.dynamicDescription:
Toggle Off: When Karthus kills a unit, he restores @ManaRestoreOnKill@ Mana.

Toggle On: Deal @TotalDPS@ magic damage to nearby enemies each second.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Requiem
spells.description: After channeling for 3 seconds, Karthus deals damage to all enemy champions.
spells.dynamicDescription: After channeling for 3 seconds, Karthus deals <magicDamage>@TotalDamage@ magic damage</magicDamage> to all enemy champions.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@
